_comment: KIT = what YOU own/want. `partId` points into catalog.json. `status`: have | ordered | want | idea. A build's `target` specs (videoSystem/radioProtocol/cellCount) are what the compat check validates each part against.

builds.name: Pavo Pico — 2S Walksnail Cinewhoop
builds.summary: First build. Digital cinewhoop on the Walksnail Avatar ecosystem, flown with the RadioMaster Pocket (ELRS). 2S / XT30.

items.note: Confirm it's the ELRS + Walksnail variant (Walksnail needs the VTX adapter).
Critical path — Pico can't fly digital without this. ~$159.
Goggles X has NO internal battery — needed to power them.
Your screwdriver TODO — Pro Kit doesn't include a driver.

builds.name: Future / Wishlist
builds.summary: Upgrades and second drones to revisit later.

items.note: Longer flight (~5 min). 3S — needs different batteries than the Pico.
4K low-light cam upgrade; ~43g, likely needs a custom Pico mount.
Lighter/cheaper air unit, but lower image quality than the Pro Kit.
